tree.name: Jakob Poeltl
tree.tradeDescription: Raptors traded Khem Birch, a 2024 first-round pick (TOR own, top-6 protected), a 2023 second-round pick (TOR own), and a 2025 second-round pick (TOR own) to Spurs for Jakob Poeltl.
tree.note: Returned to Toronto where he was originally drafted in 2016. Re-signed as FA July 6, 2023.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 1st Round Pick (#8)
assetsGivenUp.details: 2024 First Round Pick (TOR own, top-6 protected in 2024-2026). Conveyed at #8.
assetsGivenUp.note: TOR's pick conveyed at #8 to SAS (outside top-6 protection). SAS traded Dillingham to MIN on draft night.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#44)
assetsGivenUp.note: TOR's 2023 second-round pick sent to SAS in Poeltl trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#37)
assetsGivenUp.note: TOR's 2025 second-round pick sent to SAS in Poeltl trade. Subsequently traded to DET who selected Lanier.
